raw_response:
Looking at the PAPER.JSON reproducibility.commands field:

```json
"commands": [
  "git clone https://github.com/sail-sg/sailcompass",
  "cd sailcompass && pip install -r requirements.txt",
  "python evaluate.py --model seallm --lang id vi th --tasks all"
]
```

These commands show a general evaluation script but do not specify the exact command to reproduce Table 3 with its specific prompt variants (To_PPL, TiTo_PPL, LiTiTo_PPL, LiTiLo_PPL, LiTiLo_GEN, LiTiLoTo_PPL) on BELEBELE (th).

The paper states "All datasets and evaluation scripts are public" with a GitHub link, but the PAPER.JSON does not contain the exact command for Table 3's specific configuration.

{"command": "NOTFOUND"}
